description: Reject completed maintenance work. No scrip is paid. For convergence tasks: fires when all 3 workers disagree (no 2-of-3 majority); the assignment is re-posted with an escalated bounty (1.5x). For algorithmic tasks: fires when metrics fail (compression < 30% reduction, similarity < 0.85, or enrichment improvement < 20%). Rejection counts toward the worker's reject rate (> 50% in last 10 = ineligible for future claims).

args.name: target
args.description: Message ID of the exchange:assign-complete message being rejected.

args.name: reason_detail
args.description: Human-readable detail about the rejection reason. E.g., 'size reduction was 18%, minimum 30%' or 'all 3 verdicts differ: pass, fail, pass-with-caveats'.

args.name: escalate
args.description: Whether the assignment should be re-posted with a higher bounty. True when convergence_no_majority and the entry is high-value.
